title: Looking for EVA Spin off
wikitext:
[]: Looking for EVA Spin-off?             Quote Post by Azrael » Fri Sep 25, 2020 2:31 pm Hey there Forum! i would love to know where this is from. the only thing i found was this Picture in a facebook group and a spanish video on youtube (i'm not spanish so idk what it says in the video description) but the title only says EVANGELION Chibi. Can't find anything with google sadly.. maybe someone here know more! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E4LNpYWIifI

[]: Re: Looking for EVA Spin-off?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Sep 26, 2020 10:32 am Google Translate wrote: EVANGELION Chibi (Latin Audio) - Shinji decides to go up to EVA I took the dialogues out of the Animax dub and synchronized them with the clip of a pachinko from Evangelion Chibi Shinji climbs the robot Misato convinces Shinji Neon Genesis Evangelion
